content: We know perfectly well that he specialized in that language, however we can not allow him to take any sentence written in it, because that is not his native language.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by shekitten (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Sappiamo perfettamente che si è specializzato in quella lingua, ma non possiamo permettere di prendere qualsiasi frase s
